basic_details.job_title: CVRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Combat Vehicles Research and Development Establishment (CVRDE)
basic_details.short_information: Combat Vehicles Research and Development Establishment (CVRDE) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CVRDE. A total of 16 vacancies have been announced through the CVRDE Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech with First Division and valid GATE score, M.E/M.Tech with First Division
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (Mechanical Engineering): B.E./B.Tech with First Division from a recognized University with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Junior Research Fellow (Electrical and Electronics Engineering): B.E./B.Tech with First Division from a recognized University with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Junior Research Fellow (Electronics and Communication Engineering): M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level (OR) B.E/B.Tech with First Division with valid GATE score. Junior Research Fellow (Computer Science Engineering): M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level (OR) B.E/B.Tech with First Division with valid GATE score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CVRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.combat_vehicles_research_and_development: B.E./B.Tech with First Division and valid GATE score, M.E/M.Tech with First Division

content_sections.heading: CVRDE Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CVRDE Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CVRDE Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (Electrical and Electronics Engineering)
Junior Research Fellow (Electronics and Communication Engineering)

content_sections.heading: CVRDE Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (Mechanical Engineering): B.E./B.Tech with First Division from a recognized University with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Junior Research Fellow (Electrical and Electronics Engineering): B.E./B.Tech with First Division from a recognized University with valid GATE score (OR) M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level. Junior Research Fellow (Electronics and Communication Engineering): M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level (OR) B.E/B.Tech with First Division with valid GATE score. Junior Research Fellow (Computer Science Engineering): M.E/M.Tech with First Division both at Graduate and Post Graduate level (OR) B.E/B.Tech with First Division with valid GATE score.

content_sections.heading: CVRDE Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST

rows.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (Electrical and Electronics Engineering)
Junior Research Fellow (Electronics and Communication Engineering)

rows.date: Within 21 days from the date of its publication in the newspaper/ Employment News.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for CVRDE Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CVRDE Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the CVRDE Junior Research Fellow recruitment is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech with First Division and a valid GATE score, or an M.E./M.Tech with First Division at both graduate and postgraduate levels, depending on the specific engineering discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the CVRDE Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Junior Research Fellow posts is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 16 vacancies for the Junior Research Fellow posts across various engineering disciplines.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for CVRDE Junior Research Fellow recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CVRDE recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow positions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CVRDE Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CVRDE located?
faq.answer: Combat Vehicles Research and Development Establishment (CVRDE) is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600054.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions, so candidates from all over India who meet the eligibility criteria can apply.
